documents.summary: This document is an invoice from Hilpert PLC to Carter, Dicki and Lang, dated 2024-09-30. The invoice details one line item for services totaling 28,661.12 € before VAT. With 12% VAT, the total invoice amount due is 32,100.45 €, payable within 90 days by 2024-12-29.
